en.name: Saiga-12K "Workshop Fury"
en.description: A Saiga-12K that clearly didn't leave the factory like this. Originally a standard 12-gauge shotgun with a folding stock and 430mm barrel, this one was rebuilt in Tony's workshop after he got tired of seeing factory limitations ruin a good platform. The firing group has been reworked, cycling improved, and the action tuned for aggressive automatic fire. It kicks like a mule and eats shells faster than most operators can load them. Tony says it's excessive. That's exactly why he kept building them.
